subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Zaynu'l-Muqarrabin 1
subcodes.first_line: That which is of paramount importance in this day is steadfastness in the Cause of God, for fiendish souls have manifested from every side
subcodes.first_line_orig: الیوم اعظم امور ثبوت بر امر الله بوده و هست چه که شیاطین از جمیع اشطار ظاهر
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @defending the Faith; protecting the Cause; apologetics, @firmness in the Covenant, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
